steps.title: Identify what vision cannot do
steps.content: The passage states “the keenest vision can't [define]” the border line because “So perfect is the blending.” The blending is so seamless that the eye cannot perceive or distinguish where the reflection ends and the shadow begins.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
”Detect” means to perceive or identify, which fits perfectly: the keenest vision cannot detect the border line because the blending is seamless.

Explain and state involve expressing something in words, not perceiving visually; reduce has no spatial meaning.

That is the correct answer.
